title: narcissus leonensis subsp. primigenius
intro: Narcissus leonensis subsp. primigenius, also known as the Primigenius narcissus, is a rare, endemic subspecies of the narcissus plant native to the island of Crete in Greece. This subspecies has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Narcissus leonensis subsp. primigenius include infusions and extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and other medicinal products.
